mapping_mode.label: Mapping Mode
mapping_mode.description: If set to per input, then a single set of mappings is shared for all controller types. Setting to per controller type allows mapping inputs per controller type. For example, per input would treat the A button and Green fret as the same input, while per controller type would allow mapping them seperately.

face_button_mapping_mode.label: Face Button Mapping Mode
face_button_mapping_mode.description: Face buttons are in different positions on different controllers. You can map buttons based on their name or by their location. For example, if you were to use a classic controller on an xbox location based mappings would swap A with B and X with Y.

i2c.incorrect_group: I2C Pins are not from the same group

spi.incorrect_group: SPI Pins are not from the same group
